verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Lord Jesus, for including us in you; Taking all our life with you for your dying on the cross. There for we may living by your resurrection birth. Hallelujah, Lord Jesus, just in you is all worth. Hallelujah, Lord Jesus, in your life is my life.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah, my father, Hallelujah, my Lord; Thank you for your life is in us and for our life is in you. Holy and united, we will glorify your name. Hallelujah forever, hallelujah, you’re the same. Hallelujah forever glorified be thy name.
